last_assistant_message:
Bug confirmed real — old `select(length > 0)` on an empty string returns nothing, which propagates and makes jq emit empty stdout for the entire object. New filter correctly emits `null`. This means pre-3.3 the helper was indeed POSTing empty bodies for `pre_compact` / `session_end` (Task 3.2 retry test didn't notice because it asserted on counts/status, not body content).

Spec compliance verification:

| Contract field | Asserted | Line |
|---|---|---|
| event matches flag | `body.event === EVENT` | 150 |
| session_id matches stdin | `body.session_id === SESSION_ID` | 151 |
| client_scrub_applied === true | strict equal | 152 |
| client_scrub_hits >= 1 on AWS key | numeric + >=1 | 153-157 |
| client_version present (string) | typeof + length | 158-159 |
| turns is array of 2 | Array.isArray + length===2 | 162-163 |
| turns[0].role === user | strict equal | 164 |
| turns[0].text contains `[redacted:aws-key]` | `assert.match` | 169-173 |
| AKIAIOSFODNN7EXAMPLE not leaked | `assert.doesNotMatch` x2 (turn text + full body) | 174-185 |

Helper fix at `hooks/scripts/_ingest-transcript.sh:125` correctly emits `agent_type: null` when empty, matching spec line 90 ("`agent_type` only present for `event=subagent_stop`" — null/omission both acceptable; the test uses `pre_compact` event, so `null` is correct).

Commit `461080f` on `feat/transcript-ingest` touches exactly 2 files (helper + new test). No regressions: 20/20 pass.

**Verdict: SPEC COMPLIANT.**

Notes:
- Test uses `pre_compact` event, which is the exact case the helper-fix bug would have broken — good coverage of the regression path.
- Belt-and-suspenders check (`assert.doesNotMatch(rawBody, AWS_KEY)` at line 180-185) goes beyond the spec ask and guards against any future redaction-path leak.
- Commit message follows the test-style convention (`test(plugin): ...`) matching repo history (e.g. `e652ccc test(plugin): PKCE, clerkAuthFile...`).

Files referenced:
- `C:/work/mega/astramemory-plugin/tests/ingest-payload.test.mjs`
- `C:/work/mega/astramemory-plugin/hooks/scripts/_ingest-transcript.sh:125`
- `C:/work/mega/astramemory-plugin/docs/superpowers/specs/2026-06-19-astramemory-transcript-ingest-design.md:90`
